title: carex dolichocarpa
intro: Carex dolichocarpa, also known as the long-fruited sedge, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the Carex genus and is native to Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and improving digestion. Carex dolichocarpa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, making it a versatile and accessible remedy in traditional Chinese medicine.
